Game.Name: Super Baseball 2020
Game.Plot: Welcome to the year 2020, where baseball has evolved into a contest between human and machine! Enter the futuristic Cyber Egg Stadium and test your skill in 2 world-class leagues with a total of 12 different teams! Step up to the plate and play the most mind-blowing baseball game ever seen: * Collect money for great plays and use it to boost your player armor or energize your robots! * Use your Rocket Pack to jump 50 feet into the air and catch that homerun ball! * Test your batting skill against an eye-popping 200 mph curveball! * Check out the awesome graphics, exciting sound and realistic gameplay for 1 or 2 players! * Use the password feature and resume playing at any point during the season! Follow the computer as it tracks all player stats! Super Baseball 2020: You're traveling into the future of baseball and you won’t want to come back!
